creator: estartu@augusta.de
text:
Hi,

thats strange I just have searched my mail-archive and haven't found the
original Mail from GNATS about this PR.

Sorry for the delay. I would have responded long ago, if I got the mail. Maybe
it would be good to to send reminder Mails some times when PRs waiting for feedback.

Regards
    Estartu
